name: Fu Hua & Senti – Tag Team!
description:
"Fuck her pass her to my bro!"

ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

An unsuspecting user, a hungry MANTIS, and a Herrscher who's too excitable for her own good. What could possibly go wrong?

You've known Senti for a while and Hua for even longer. As a Valkyrie and crew of the Hyperion, you often see the duo during your daily duties, yet, they see you more often. When you're not paying attention, when you're slacking off, when you're too busy to even lift your head. You know not the ways in which they undress you with their eyes.

Now they're going to undress you themselves.

TLDR: They're gonna pass you around like a fresh blunt lol.

All art is from @herrscherofsex on Twitter!
creator: herrscher_of_soup
